summary: Created tsconfig.json with ES2022 target, NodeNext module/moduleResolution, strict mode, dist/ outDir, and **/* include. Created src/index.ts with export {} as empty project marker.
Created jest.config.js with @swc/jest transform scoped to tests/unit/**/*.test.ts. Added test:unit script to package.json. Created passing sanity test at tests/unit/setup.test.ts.

Created playwright.config.ts with headless Chromium, baseURL http://localhost:3000, testDir ./tests/e2e. Created sanity test at tests/e2e/setup.spec.ts navigating to about:blank and asserting empty title. Added test:e2e script and updated test script to run test:unit && test:e2e sequentially.

task: Wire up a root test script
summary: No changes required. The package.json 'test' script was already set to 'npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e' from the previous Playwright configuration cycle.

task: Update Playwright configuration with webServer block
summary: Added webServer configuration to playwright.config.ts with command 'npm start' and url 'http://localhost:3000' to enable automatic server startup during E2E tests.

No code files were modified - the HTML and CSS files were already created. Ran npm install to install the serve dependency which was blocking the webServer startup. Linting and type checking both passed. Implementation ready for test validation.

Replaced homepage with a centered 3x3 tic-tac-toe grid. Implemented using CSS Grid with 4px gaps showing black background for thick borders (no outer perimeter). Grid is 300x300px with 3rem margins, centered both horizontally and vertically on the page using flexbox. All 9 tiles have data-testid attributes and are initially empty.

task: Add a click event for tiles
summary: Added embedded JavaScript to handle tile clicks with alternating X/O turns. Tracks currentPlayer state, prevents re-clicking filled tiles, and toggles player after each valid click.

Added reset button below grid with event handler to clear all tiles and reset player. Updated CSS to use flex-column layout with gap spacing, styled button with blue background (#0066cc), white text, 8px border-radius, and darker blue hover state (#003d99).

Added win detection for rows, columns, and diagonals. Created checkWin() function that analyzes board state after each move and displays 'X has won!' or 'O has won!' message in game-message element. Updated reset handler to clear the victory message.

task: Detect a draw when the last tile cannot result in a win
summary: Added draw detection with two scenarios: (1) all 9 tiles filled with no winner, (2) exactly 1 empty tile and next move cannot result in a win. Modified checkWin() to accept optional boardState parameter and added wouldResultInWin() helper function to check if placing a mark in the remaining empty tile would create a winning condition.
